agentAbility.name: Lights Out
agentAbility.description: Deploys an EMP bomb via drone. Pulses Slow enemies before the final detonation Jams and damages them.

agentTrait.name: Daredevil
agentTrait.description: Reloads faster while boosting, charges Boost Energy while drifting, and takes less fall damage.

primaryAttack.name: Single Shot
primaryAttack.description: Requires reload after each shot, most accurate when stationary.

tankAbilities.name: Manual Emergency APS
tankAbilities.description: An emergency shield protecting the tank from the next incoming high-caliber shell.
